JScience 1.0.0-SNAPSHOT
  1. org.jscience.natural.biology

Uses of Package
org.jscience.natural.biology

Packages that use org.jscience.natural.biology
Package
Description
org.jscience.natural.biology
 
org.jscience.natural.biology.cell
 
org.jscience.natural.biology.ecology
 
org.jscience.natural.biology.genealogy
Biological taxonomy, genetics, and physiological modeling.
org.jscience.natural.biology.loaders
 
org.jscience.natural.biology.loaders.biopax
BioPAX loader for biological pathways and networks.
org.jscience.natural.biology.loaders.itis
Biological taxonomy, genetics, and physiological modeling.
org.jscience.natural.biology.loaders.pdbml
PDBML loader for Protein Data Bank macromolecular structures.
org.jscience.natural.biology.loaders.sbml
Systems Biology Markup Language (SBML) loader for JScience.
org.jscience.natural.biology.taxonomy
 
org.jscience.natural.earth
 
org.jscience.natural.methodology.experiment
Core functionality for the org.jscience.core.methodology.experiment package in the JScience library.
org.jscience.social.arts
- artworks, music, literature classification.
org.jscience.social.economics
Provides comprehensive mathematical models for economic systems, agent-based modeling, and financial analysis.
org.jscience.social.economics.resources
Provides classes and interfaces for representing economic resources.
org.jscience.social.geography
Provides classes for social geography, human settlements, and mapping.
org.jscience.social.law
Provides the org.jscience.social.law module.
org.jscience.social.linguistics
Provides mathematical and computational models for natural language processing, linguistic analysis, and glottochronology.
org.jscience.social.medicine.consultation
Core functionality for the org.jscience.social.medicine.consultation package in the JScience library.
org.jscience.social.politics
Provides the org.jscience.social.politics module.
org.jscience.social.psychology
Provides the org.jscience.social.psychology module.
org.jscience.social.psychology.social
Provides the org.jscience.social.psychology.social module.
org.jscience.social.sociology
- social structures, persons, and cultural modeling.
  • Classes in org.jscience.natural.biology used by org.jscience.natural.biology
    Class
    Description
    Base
    Represents the nucleobases found in DNA and RNA.
    Behavior
    Represents a biological behavior or action pattern.
    BioChemicalReaction
    Represents a biochemical reaction converting reactants to products.
    BioChemicalReaction.BioProduct
     
    BioChemicalReaction.BioReactant
     
    BiologicalSex
    Extensible enumeration for biological sex.
    BiologyConstants.Diet
    Dietary classifications.
    BiologyConstants.InteractionType
    Ecological interaction types.
    BiologyConstants.Sense
    Sensory perception types.
    BiologyConstants.TaxonomicRank
    Taxonomic ranks.
    BiologyConstants.ThermalRegulation
    Thermal regulation modes.
    BiologyConstants.TrophicLevel
    Trophic levels.
    BloodType
    Extensible categorization of human blood types.
    DNA
    Represents a Deoxyribonucleic acid (DNA) strand.
    DynasticCalculator.DynasticPerson
    Represents a person within a dynastic lineage.
    DynasticCalculator.Gender
    Gender for dynastic succession priority logic.
    Individual
    Represents an individual organism - a single instance of a species.
    LifeStage
    Extensible categorization of organism life stages.
    OrganType
    Extensible categorization of biological organs (e.g.
    Protein.Chain
     
    Protein.Residue
     
    ProteinFolding.Residue
     
    ProteinFolding.Structure
     
    ProteinSecondaryStructure.StructurePrediction
     
    ProteinSecondaryStructure.StructureType
     
    ReproductionMode
    Extensible categorization of biological reproduction modes.
    RNA
    Represents a Ribonucleic acid (RNA) strand.
    SocialEntity
    Base class for all social entities (individuals or collectives).
    Taxon
    Represents a taxonomic group in a phylogenetic tree.
    Tissue
    Represents a biological tissue.
    TissueType
    Extensible categorization of biological tissues (e.g.
    Virus
    Represents a virus - an infectious agent that replicates inside living cells.
    Virus.Stage
    Virus lifecycle stages.
    VirusGenomeType
    Extensible enumeration for virus genome types (Baltimore classification).
    VirusMorphology
    Extensible enumeration for virus morphology.
    VirusSpecies
    Represents a virus species in biological taxonomy.
    Vitamin
    Represents a vitamin with nutritional data.
